prompt: Edit image 1: Replace the markers for the highest data points on each axis with shapes inspired by the sparkle graphic from image 2. Update the chart by recoloring the white background with the palest yellow from image 3.

Additionally, recolor the entire white background of the chart to match the palest yellow found on the leftmost strip of image 3.
objects: Chart axes (Semantic Consistency (SC) Average and Perceptual Quality (PQ) Average)
Data point markers (circular, excluding the two highest values)
